name: RedTiger-Tools
desc: RedTiger-Tools is a multifunction automation tool dedicated to pentesting and OSINT. The project is open source and designed to be fully configurable according…
descFull: RedTiger-Tools is a multifunction automation tool dedicated to pentesting and OSINT. The project is open source and designed to be fully configurable according to user needs. It also includes a plugin system that allows users to extend or create new features, in order to centralize multiple tools into a single unified platform.
